[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Hol B'shaki''',<ref name="Gamer 1" /> or '''Hool''', was a [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] soldier who fought in the [[Nagai–Tof War]]. Hool served under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Ozrei N'takkilomandrife]] and was ordered to lead the attack force in the [[Second Battle of Endor]]. He led a squad of Nagai and [[Maccabree]] warriors in an assault on the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] flight center.<ref name="MC 100" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Marvel comic calls this Nagai "Hool", yet both an [[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series|article]] in [[Star Wars Gamer 1|''Star Wars Gamer'' 1]] and ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' call him "Hol."<ref name="Gamer 1" /><ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> It is clear from the context that these are the same individuals. As many of the Nagai names in the original Marvel series have been [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] into nicknames, it is likely this occurred here.
